results.title: Rupee rises 5 paise against US dollar in early trade
results.description: The rupee appreciated 5 paise to 96.11 against the US dollar in early trade on Wednesday, supported by a weaker dollar and positive domestic equities. However, higher crude oil prices, foreign fund outflows and tensions in West Asia limited the currency's gains

results.title: County Council needs to shelve its latest no-vote-of-the-people tax-increase maneuver: editorial
results.description: As our editorial board has previously noted, one constructive alternative would be to increase the city’s admissions tax but limit the increase only to the two Gateway facilities – Progressive Field and Rocket Arena.

results.title: SUTNTIB AB Tewox publishes its factsheet for the second quarter of 2026
results.description: Vilnius, Lithuania, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SUTNTIB AB Tewox ( the Company ) publishes its factsheet, providing information about Company’s financial indicators and key events as at 30 June 2026.

results.title: Italy plans to exit bank stakes, minister says
ITR filing 2026: How to access interest certificate from SBI, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, PNB and India Post
results.description: The ITR due date is near and taxpayers are urged to gather important documents, including interest certificates, to ensure accurate reporting of income. Here is a step-by-step guide to download interest certificate from SBI, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, PNB and India Post.
